name: SOL Data Feasibility
scope: Research Lab data-quality diagnostic only. No market data persistence, strategy backtest, runtime implementation, PAPER deployment, LIVE deployment, or threshold change.
edge_rationale: Before testing whether frozen trial-00095 sweep/reclaim transfers to SOLUSDT, the project must verify that SOL market data sources are available with quality comparable to BTC and ETH research snapshots.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: No trading edge is tested. The milestone validates data feasibility for candles, funding, open interest, aggtrade-derived flow, and archive availability.
baseline_reference: BTC trial-00095 and ETH transfer feasibility data path
frozen_assumptions: No market data is written by this milestone.
No production, PAPER, LIVE, runtime, core, execution, orchestrator, settings, or storage changes.
A clean SOL sample does not approve SOL strategy transfer research.
Full SOL historical backfill and data audit are required before any SOL trial-00095 transfer replay.
SOL shadow or PAPER runtime is out of scope.
expected_observation: A useful result determines whether SOLUSDT source APIs and archives are available and whether recent samples pass timestamp, missingness, duplicate, OHLC, funding, OI, and aggtrade checks.

kill_criteria.api_unavailable: Any required recent sample family unavailable blocks SOL data feasibility.
kill_criteria.candle_quality_failure: OHLC violations, duplicate candles, or more than 1% missing 15m/4h candles blocks the direction.
kill_criteria.flow_unavailable: No aggtrade-derived flow sample blocks trial-00095 transfer research because TFI/CVD features cannot be reconstructed.
kill_criteria.historical_archive_coverage_risk: Historical archive coverage below 75% makes full SOL backfill inconclusive until a provider plan exists.
kill_criteria.runtime_change: Any runtime/core/settings/data persistence change invalidates this milestone.

failure_modes: Recent public REST samples are clean but historical archives are incomplete.
SOL open interest history has API or archive limitations.
SOL aggtrade archives are too large or incomplete for 2022-2026 TFI reconstruction.
SOL has materially different launch-date coverage than BTC/ETH and requires adjusted backfill window.
Recent sample quality looks good but historical backfill quality fails.
out_of_scope: Writing sampled market data into SQLite
Changing runtime, PAPER, LIVE, core, orchestrator, risk, or execution behavior
author: Codex
